queries.compiledQueryString:
select
  sort_order as "#",
  challenge_text as "Question",
  case when too_many_hops then 'Yes' else 'No' end as "Too Many Hops"
from sql_answers
where batch_id != -1
group by sort_order, challenge_text, too_many_hops
order by sort_order
queries.inputQueryString:
select
  sort_order as "#",
  challenge_text as "Question",
  case when too_many_hops then 'Yes' else 'No' end as "Too Many Hops"
from sql_answers
where batch_id != -1
group by sort_order, challenge_text, too_many_hops
order by sort_order
